message:
refactor(sparse): use struct initialization syntax in spsolve tests

Replace mutable-default-then-assign pattern with direct struct
initialization using ..Default::default() spread syntax in three
sparse linear algebra test functions:

- spsolve_skips_non_finite_check_when_disabled
- spsolve_hardened_rejects_empty_structural_row
- spsolve_strict_empty_structural_row_is_not_immediate_error

This is more idiomatic Rust: it makes the non-default field values
immediately visible at construction time rather than requiring the
reader to scan subsequent mutation lines, and it prevents accidental
use of the SolveOptions before all fields are set.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
